title: AuditEvent
description: Normalized record of a security-relevant system event. All authorization decisions, policy changes, identity lifecycle events, and emergency overrides are represented as AuditEvent records. Field names are stable external identifiers — they must not be renamed once in production use.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit record. UUID v4.

event_type.description: Category of the event. Used for filtering and routing in the audit pipeline.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the event occurred (not the time it was written to storage).

subject_id.description: Stable identifier of the subject. Null for system events with no associated principal.

subject_roles.description: Roles held by the subject at the time of the event.

action.description: Action name. Stable external identifier — appears verbatim in stored records.

resource_id.description: Normalized resource identifier. Null if the event is not resource-specific.

resource_type.description: ResourceType value (e.g., 'hvac', 'sensor', 'device'). Null if not applicable.

evaluated_by.description: Name of the policy or component that produced this decision.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy set in effect at evaluation time.

request_id.description: DecisionRequest.request_id for correlation with the request and response records.

detail.description: Arbitrary key/value context. Command parameters, error information, adapter metadata. Structure is event-type-specific.
